DISCOVERY 302, PRO TEM ERNST HALPERIN DISCLOSES TO THE PARTIES THAT HE IS A CO-CHAIR OF THE ADVISORY COUNCIL TO THE 360 CENTER AT USCF PARNASSUS. THE 360 CENTER IS AN HIV PRIMARY CARE CLINIC. THE ADVISORY COUNCIL SERVES AS A FUNDRAISING GROUP FOR THE CLINIC. THE PARTIES DID NOT RAISE ANY CONCERNS THEY MAY HAVE REGARDING THIS DISCLOSURE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF REGINA POTASCHER'S MOTION TO COMPEL AND FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN PART. REQUEST FOR SANCTION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. PRO TEM JUDGE: ERNST HALPERIN; NOT REPORTED.

Ntc Of Motio To Compel Aand Ffor Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-25-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. BOONE CALLAWAY OF CALLAWAY & WOLF, TEL. NO. 541-0300 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. B. THOMAS FRENCH OF HASSARD BONNINGTON, LLP, TEL. NO. 288-9801 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF UC.

RULING - Pro Tem Ernst Halperin discloses to the parties that he is a Co-Chair of the Advisory Council to the 360 Center at USCF Parnassus. The 360 Center is an HIV primary care clinic. The Advisory Council serves as a fundraising group for the clinic. The parties did not raise any concerns they may have regarding this disclosure. The matter was argued. The court ruled as follows: PLAINTIFF REGINA POTASCHER'S Motion To Compel And for Sanctions is granted in Part. Request for sanction is denied. Plaintiff's counsel to prepare a form of order. Pro Tem Judge: Ernst Halperin; Not reported =302/jpt
